# Damini Estate

> Damini Estate (Damini Real Estate L.L.C) is a RERA-licensed (License 57358), TruBroker-accredited full-service real estate brokerage based in Business Bay, Dubai, UAE. We help clients buy, sell, rent, and invest in residential, off-plan, and commercial property across Dubai, and support property-linked Golden Visa relocation. Founded and led by Lola Damini. The team works in English and Russian and serves overseas buyers remotely.

## Contact
- WhatsApp: +971 58 572 0882
- Email: info@daminiestate.ae
- Office: Crystal Tower, Office 1102, Business Bay, Dubai, UAE
- Hours: Monday to Saturday, 9:00 to 19:00 (GST)
- Listings: https://www.bayut.com/companies/damini-real-estate-108837/

## Services
- [Residential Sales](https://daminiestate.ae/services/residential-sales/): Buying and selling apartments, townhouses and villas across Dubai.
- [Off-Plan Investments](https://daminiestate.ae/services/off-plan-investments/): Priority access to launches, payment plans, honest risk and exit assessment.
- [Commercial Real Estate](https://daminiestate.ae/services/commercial-real-estate/): Offices, retail and commercial assets for occupiers and investors.
- [Investment Advisory](https://daminiestate.ae/services/investment-advisory/): Data-led yield, ROI, total-cost and exit modelling.
- [Property Management](https://daminiestate.ae/services/property-management/): Hands-off management for landlords and overseas owners; tenants, Ejari, rent, maintenance.
- [Golden Visa & Relocation](https://daminiestate.ae/services/golden-visa-relocation/): Qualifying property selection and relocation support for the UAE Golden Visa.

## Area guides (where to buy in Dubai)
- [Business Bay](https://daminiestate.ae/areas/business-bay/): Central canal district; apartment gross yields roughly 5.7 to 7%, short-let 7 to 8%; avg ~AED 1,580/sqft.
- [Downtown Dubai](https://daminiestate.ae/areas/downtown-dubai/): Trophy district around the Burj Khalifa; gross yields ~5 to 6.25%; avg ~AED 2,950/sqft; prized for value retention and liquidity.
- [Dubai Hills Estate](https://daminiestate.ae/areas/dubai-hills-estate/): Green, family villa community around a golf course; gross yields ~5.5 to 7%; stability and appreciation.
- [Palm Jumeirah](https://daminiestate.ae/areas/palm-jumeirah/): Beachfront trophy island; apartment gross yields ~4.5 to 5.6%; appreciation-led, ~AED 3,100+/sqft.
- [MBR City](https://daminiestate.ae/areas/mbr-city/): Lagoon-led new-build district near Downtown; gross yields ~5 to 6.5%; ~AED 2,200+/sqft; balanced yield plus growth.
- [JVC (Jumeirah Village Circle)](https://daminiestate.ae/areas/jvc/): Affordable, high-yield district; gross yields ~6.8 to 8.5%; the go-to for buy-to-let.

- [Best Areas for Rental Yield in Dubai (2026)](https://daminiestate.ae/blog/best-areas-rental-yield-dubai/)

## Common questions
- Can foreigners buy property in Dubai? Yes. Non-residents can buy freehold property in designated areas with full ownership, including apartments, villas and commercial units.
- How much does buying cost on top of the price? Budget roughly 6 to 7%: the 4% Dubai Land Department transfer fee, plus agency and trustee fees, and mortgage costs if financing.
- How do you qualify for the UAE Golden Visa through property? A qualifying purchase from around AED 2 million can support a long-term renewable residency visa; rules are set by the UAE government.
- Which Dubai areas have the highest rental yields? Value districts like JVC lead (roughly 6.8 to 8.5% gross), while trophy areas like Downtown and Palm Jumeirah lean toward appreciation over yield.

## Notes
- Languages: English and Russian (in-page toggle).
- The site links to Bayut for live listing details while an in-house listings platform is finalised.
- Market figures are indicative ranges for 2026 and are confirmed per property at enquiry.
- Calculators provide indicative estimates only and are not financial advice.
